Appearances:
Plaintiff, Caritas Managementis present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michaelangelo Garcia, is present.
Attorney, James Birkelund , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-21-2010 is vacated.
